creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: riggs
Date: Sun Oct  4 08:41:20 UTC 2015
New revision: 398565
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/398565

Log:
  Update to upstream version 0.4.2, port cleanup

  - Simplify fft handling:
    Only allow single precision fftw3 (recommended by upstream)
    or built-in ooula (fallback)
  - Use OPTION helpers
  - Add LICENSE_FILE
  - Pet portlint

  PR:		203239
  Submitted by:	tkato432@yahoo.com
  Reviewed by:	riggs

Changes:
  head/audio/aubio/Makefile
  head/audio/aubio/distinfo
  head/audio/aubio/files/patch-wscript
  head/audio/aubio/pkg-plist
